title: Intermittent timeout on bulk label generation endpoint
description: Bulk label generation times out under high load (>500 requests/min). Workaround: reduce batch size to 50 per request.

title: Rate limiter regression causes 429s for authenticated users
description: Authenticated API users receive HTTP 429 after 100 requests/min instead of the contracted 1000 requests/min. Introduced in 2.4.0. No workaround available.

title: Address validation returns incorrect ZIP+4 for PO Boxes
description: PO Box addresses returned wrong ZIP+4 suffix. Fixed in 2.4.0.

title: PDF label generation fails for international shipments with non-ASCII characters
description: Labels for shipments with recipient names containing non-ASCII characters (accented letters, CJK characters) produce malformed PDFs that fail USPS/Canada Post barcode scans.

title: QR code contrast ratio fails WCAG AA for thermal printers
description: QR codes on 203 dpi thermal printers fall below WCAG 2.1 AA contrast ratio. No impact on barcode scanners. Accessibility improvement tracked for Q3.

title: Duplicate tracking number issued for concurrent label requests
description: Under concurrent load, the label service issues identical tracking numbers for distinct shipments. Affects 0.3% of requests. Root cause is a race condition in the tracking number sequence generator.

title: SMS notifications delayed by up to 4 minutes during peak hours
description: SMS delivery delays traced to provider throttling. Resolved by implementing exponential backoff and queue prioritization in 1.2.0.

title: Email templates missing FedEx branding footer in dark mode
description: Dark mode email clients (Gmail, Apple Mail) hide the FedEx branded footer div due to a missing prefers-color-scheme media query. Cosmetic issue only — no functional impact.

title: Webhook retry logic does not respect Retry-After header
description: Outbound webhooks retry immediately on HTTP 429 instead of honoring the Retry-After response header. May cause downstream partner rate-limit violations.

title: JWT refresh token not invalidated on password reset
description: When a user resets their password, existing JWT refresh tokens remain valid until natural expiry (24 hours). Security team classifies this as a blocking security defect.

title: CORS preflight returns incorrect Allow-Origin for internal microservices
description: Internal service-to-service CORS preflight responses include an overly broad wildcard origin. No external exposure — internal network only.

title: Tracking events out of chronological order for multi-leg shipments
description: Multi-leg international shipments display tracking events out of chronological order due to timezone normalization missing for hub scan events.

title: Last-mile carrier tracking feed drops events from certain regional carriers
description: Tracking feeds from six regional last-mile carriers are silently dropped when they use non-standard event code formats. Affects <2% of shipments in rural areas.

title: Dimensional weight rounding error for international freight invoices
description: Dimensional weight rounding uses ceiling instead of standard commercial rounding for international freight, causing systematic overbilling of $0.01–$0.12 per shipment. Finance team requires correction before next billing cycle.

title: Fuel surcharge not applied to third-party billing accounts
description: Third-party billing accounts were excluded from the Q2 fuel surcharge update. Fixed and retroactively applied in 3.1.1.
